summary: All Enterprise tier and billing button tests PASSED. Verified Landing page shows all 4 tiers (Free, Standard, Pro, Enterprise) with correct pricing ($0, $39, $119, $239 for annual). Dashboard Billing page shows all 4 plans with correct buttons - Free shows 'Current Plan' (not 'Downgrade'), Standard/Pro/Enterprise show 'Upgrade'. All Stripe checkout modals work correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page: All 4 pricing tiers displayed (Free, Standard, Pro, Enterprise)
Landing page: Monthly/Annual toggle works correctly
Landing page: Annual prices correct - Free $0, Standard $39, Pro $119, Enterprise $239
Landing page: Monthly prices correct - Free $0, Standard $49, Pro $149, Enterprise $299
Landing page: Annual savings displayed - Standard $120, Pro $360, Enterprise $720
Landing page: Free button shows 'Start Free'
Landing page: Standard button shows 'Start Free, Upgrade Later'
Landing page: Pro button shows 'Start Free, Upgrade Later'
Landing page: Enterprise button shows 'Contact Sales'
Landing page: All pricing CTA buttons navigate to /register
Landing page: Sign In navigates to /login
Dashboard Billing: All 4 plan cards displayed
Dashboard Billing: Free plan shows 'Current Plan' button (NOT 'Downgrade')
Dashboard Billing: Standard plan shows 'Upgrade' button
Dashboard Billing: Pro plan shows 'Upgrade' button
Dashboard Billing: Enterprise plan shows 'Upgrade' button
Dashboard Billing: Clicking Standard 'Upgrade' opens Stripe checkout modal
Dashboard Billing: Clicking Enterprise 'Upgrade' opens Stripe checkout modal
Backend: GET /api/billing/plans returns all 4 plans with correct pricing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise tier ($239/mo annual, $299/mo monthly) has been added to both Landing page and Dashboard Billing page. All pricing, buttons, and checkout flows verified working. The canUpgrade function in Billing.js correctly handles the plan hierarchy (free < standard < pro < enterprise). Free plan users see 'Current Plan' button, higher plans show 'Upgrade' buttons. No 'Downgrade' button issues found.
